flights.notes: Singapore Airlines direct from DEL/BOM/BLR. Book Saver awards.
flights.availability_tip: Best availability 330 days out or within 2 weeks of departure

flights.notes: Via Istanbul on Turkish Airlines. Free stopover in IST.
flights.availability_tip: Good partner award availability on Star Alliance

flights.notes: Direct Air France/KLM. Watch for monthly Promo Rewards at 50% off.
flights.availability_tip: Promo Rewards announced first week of each month

flights.notes: Qatar Airways DOH flights. Low taxes compared to BA metal.
Book IndiGo/Air India via BA. Only worth it during peak pricing.
flights.availability_tip: All seats available on IndiGo as revenue tickets

flights.notes: Air India direct DEL-JFK/SFO/ORD on Star Alliance award.
flights.availability_tip: Check Air India availability via United.com

flights.notes: Via Singapore. Can add free stopover in SIN.
flights.availability_tip: SQ releases partner space closer to departure

flights.notes: Via Singapore on SQ. Excellent hard product on A350/777.
flights.availability_tip: Check SQ and partner (Air India) availability

flights.notes: Emirates A380 First Class experience. Chauffeur service included.
flights.availability_tip: First class opens up closer to departure

flights.notes: Via Qatar DOH or SriLankan. Short-haul zone pricing.
flights.availability_tip: Book well in advance for peak season

hotels.notes: Hyatt Regency and Hyatt Place in India. Best hotel points value.
hotels.tip: Globalist status gives suite upgrades + breakfast

hotels.notes: Book 5 nights, pay for 4 in points. Effectively 20% discount.
hotels.tip: Stack with Platinum breakfast benefit for maximum value

hotels.notes: Luxury properties accessible with points. 5th night free stacks.
hotels.tip: Gold status (free via Amex Platinum) gives breakfast

hotels.notes: Book 4 nights, get the 4th free. InterContinental properties.
hotels.tip: Ambassador status upgrade to suite + breakfast
